ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-03-2004 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jan-22-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Mary Hinds.
Elizabeth McDonald, Esq. for Plaintiff Santa Barbara Bank and Trust.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendants: BGB. Inc.; Roy Muller and Quay Sinh Vong.
Damages of $76,565.38
Attorney's fees of $3,500.00
Costs of $431.00
Interest of $11,512.53
For the total of $92,008.91
Judgment signed in open court.
